metadata.description: XdrLogRaider — Sentinel content (parsers, workbooks, analytic rules, hunting queries).

tags.value: Configuration changes made outside 0900-1700 tenant-local time.
tags.name: description

properties.query: union (MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(7d, 1h)), (MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(7d, 30m)) | extend HourOfDay = datetime_part("Hour", TimeGenerated), DayOfWeek = dayofweek(TimeGenerated) | where HourOfDay < 9 or HourOfDay >= 17 or DayOfWeek == 0d or DayOfWeek == 6d

tags.value: Every ASR rule mode transition over the last 30 days.
tags.name: description

properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(30d, 1h) | where StreamName == "MDE_AsrRulesConfig_CL" and FieldName == "mode" | project TimeGenerated, RuleId = EntityId, From = OldValue, To = NewValue | order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.value: Join drift events with AuditLogs to surface who changed what Defender config.
tags.name: description

properties.query: union (MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(7d, 1h)), (MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(7d, 30m)), (MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d)) | join kind=leftouter (AuditLogs | where Category in ("PolicyManagement", "DefenderXdrSettings") | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | project ChangedBy = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), AuditTime = TimeGenerated, AuditTarget = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)) on $left.EntityId == $right.AuditTarget | summarize Count = count() by ChangedBy, StreamName | order by Count desc

tags.value: Full current text of all tenant custom detections — governance review artifact.
tags.name: description

properties.query: MDE_CustomDetections_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | extend Name = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).displayName), Enabled = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).isEnabled), Query = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).queryText), Schedule = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).schedule) | project EntityId, Name, Enabled, Schedule, Query, TimeGenerated

tags.value: File/path/process exclusions added in the last 90 days. Attackers abuse exclusions for persistence.
tags.name: description

properties.query: MDE_AntivirusPolicy_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(90d) | extend Exclusions = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).exclusions) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId, Exclusions | order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.value: Live Response sessions initiated without a paired incident or investigation.
tags.name: description

properties.query: MDE_ActionCenter_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | extend Type = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).actionType), InvestigationId = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).investigationId) | where Type has "LiveResponse" and isempty(InvestigationId)
properties.displayName: MDE Live Response sessions without justification

tags.value: Changes to MDI directory service account classifications.
tags.name: description

properties.query: MDE_Drift_P5Identity(30d, 1d) | where StreamName == "MDE_IdentityServiceAccounts_CL"

tags.value: Role assignments to accounts that previously had none.
tags.name: description

properties.query: MDE_Drift_P2Governance(30d, 1d) | where StreamName == "MDE_UnifiedRbacRoles_CL" and ChangeType == "Added" | join kind=inner (MDE_UnifiedRbacRoles_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId) on EntityId

tags.value: Composite signal combining suppression additions + ASR downgrades + PUA off in same day.
tags.name: description

properties.query: let drift = MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(7d, 1h); let suppressions = drift | where StreamName == "MDE_SuppressionRules_CL" and ChangeType == "Added"; let asrDowngrades = drift | where StreamName == "MDE_AsrRulesConfig_CL" and FieldName == "mode" and OldValue == "Block"; let puaOff = drift | where StreamName == "MDE_PUAConfig_CL" and FieldName == "enabled" and NewValue == "false"; union suppressions, asrDowngrades, puaOff | summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | where Events >= 2

tags.value: Nodes newly identified as chokepoints — they sit on many attack paths.
tags.name: description

properties.query: MDE_Drift_P3Exposure(30d, 1h) | where StreamName == "MDE_XspmChokePoints_CL" and ChangeType == "Added"

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# MDE Compliance Dashboard

Current state of Defender XDR tenant security configuration, with recent drift highlighted.

**Data source**: 19 `MDE_*_CL` P0 streams polled hourly by the XdrLogRaider Function App."},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timerange-param","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"style":"pills","queryType":0},"name":"parameters"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_Heartbeat_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where Tier == 'P0'
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), Streams = max(StreamsSucceeded) by FunctionName
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen > ago(30m), '✅ Healthy', '❌ Stale')","size":0,"title":"Connector health (last hour)","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"health-panel"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(24h, 1h)
| summarize Changes = count() by StreamName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"P0 drift events (last 24h)","queryType":0},"name":"drift-timechart"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_AsrRulesConfig_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId
| extend Mode = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).mode)
| project EntityId, Mode, TimeGenerated
| extend Status = case(Mode == 'Block', '✅ Block', Mode == 'Audit', '⚠️ Audit', '❌ Off')
| order by EntityId asc","size":0,"title":"ASR rule modes (current)","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"asr-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_LiveResponseConfig_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId
| extend AllowUnsignedScripts = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).allowUnsignedScripts)
| project EntityId, AllowUnsignedScripts, TimeGenerated","size":0,"title":"Live Response config","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"lr-table"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(24h, 1h)
| join kind=leftouter (AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | project TargetResource = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName), InitiatedByUpn = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)) on $left.EntityId == $right.TargetResource
| project TimeGenerated, StreamName, EntityId, FieldName, OldValue, NewValue, ChangeType, InitiatedByUpn
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Recent changes with attribution","queryType":0,"visualization":"table"},"name":"recent-changes-table"}],"fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDEComplianceDashboard","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_DriftReport","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Drift Report\n\nAll configuration drift across P0/P1/P2/P5/P7 categories, unioned and enriched with AuditLogs attribution."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Primary view","size":0,"query":"union (MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(7d, 1h) | extend Category = \"P0 Config\"), (MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(7d, 30m) | extend Category = \"P1 Pipeline\"), (MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d) | extend Category = \"P2 Governance\"), (MDE_Drift_P5Identity(7d, 1d) | extend Category = \"P5 Identity\"), (MDE_Drift_P7Metadata(30d, 1d) | extend Category = \"P7 Metadata\") | summarize Changes = count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render timechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Drift / trend","size":0,"query":"union (MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(7d, 1h)), (MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(7d, 30m)), (MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d)), (MDE_Drift_P5Identity(7d, 1d)), (MDE_Drift_P7Metadata(30d, 1d)) | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_ExposureMap","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Exposure Map\n\nXSPM attack paths, chokepoints, and exposure score trends."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Primary view","size":0,"query":"MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | extend EntryNode = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).entryNode), TargetNode = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).targetNode), Hops = toint(parse_json(RawJson).hops) | project EntryNode, TargetNode, Hops","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Drift / trend","size":0,"query":"MDE_ExposureSnapshots_CL | extend Score = todouble(parse_json(RawJson).score) | summarize AvgScore = avg(Score) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | render timechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_GovernanceScorecard","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Governance Scorecard\n\nRBAC, asset classification, and approval governance posture."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Primary view","size":0,"query":"MDE_RbacDeviceGroups_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | project EntityId, RawJson, TimeGenerated","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Drift / trend","size":0,"query":"MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d) | summarize Changes = count() by StreamName | render piechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_IdentityPosture","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Identity Posture\n\nMDI service account coverage, DC onboarding, alert threshold drift."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Primary view","size":0,"query":"MDE_DCCoverage_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | extend Covered = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).hasSensor) | summarize Coverage = countif(Covered == \"true\"), Total = count() | extend CoveragePct = todouble(Coverage) / todouble(Total) * 100","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Drift / trend","size":0,"query":"MDE_Drift_P5Identity(30d, 1d) | summarize Changes = count() by StreamName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | render timechart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

{"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json","fallbackResourceIds":[],"fromTemplateId":"sentinel-MDE_ResponseAudit","items":[{"name":"header","content":{"json":"# MDE Response Audit\n\nAction Center history with approvers, comments, and time-to-action metrics."},"type":1},{"name":"parameters","content":{"parameters":[{"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"id":"tr","name":"TimeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]}}],"queryType":0,"style":"pills","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0"},"type":9},{"name":"panel-1","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Primary view","size":0,"query":"MDE_ActionCenter_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) | extend ActionType = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).actionType), Status = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).status), Approver = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).approverUpn) | summarize Count = count() by ActionType, Status | render barchart","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3},{"name":"panel-2","content":{"queryType":0,"title":"Drift / trend","size":0,"query":"MDE_ActionCenter_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | extend ActionType = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).actionType), Status = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).status), Created = todatetime(parse_json(RawJson).creationDateTimeUtc), Completed = todatetime(parse_json(RawJson).completionDateTimeUtc) | extend TimeToAction = datetime_diff(\"minute\", Completed, Created) | project TimeGenerated, EntityId, ActionType, Status, TimeToAction","version":"KqlItem/1.0"},"type":3}],"version":"Notebook/1.0"}

properties.description: An alert tuning rule was widened — may hide genuine alerts from analysts.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_AlertTuning_CL" | where ChangeType == "Modified" | where FieldName in ("conditions","scope")

properties.description: A Defender ASR rule was moved from Block to Audit or Off, reducing attack surface protection.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_AsrRulesConfig_CL" | where FieldName == "mode" | where OldValue == "Block" and NewValue in ("Audit", "Off")

properties.description: A new third-party app was connected to Defender with API access.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(1h, 10m) | where StreamName == "MDE_ConnectedApps_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"

properties.description: A new streaming/export destination was added to Defender data export settings. Potential data-exfiltration channel.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(1h, 10m) | where StreamName == "MDE_DataExportSettings_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"

properties.description: The Defender Live Response unsigned-scripts policy was enabled tenant-wide. This allows arbitrary scripts to run on managed endpoints without code signing.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_LiveResponseConfig_CL" | where FieldName == "allowUnsignedScripts" and NewValue == "true"
properties.displayName: MDE Live Response unsigned scripts enabled

properties.description: A Defender for Identity domain controller sensor stopped reporting. Identity threat detection gap.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P5Identity(2d, 1h) | where StreamName == "MDE_DCCoverage_CL" | where FieldName == "hasSensor" and OldValue == "true" and NewValue == "false"

properties.description: A tenant-configuration change was made outside 0900-1700 local time.
properties.query: union (MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m)), (MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(1h, 10m)), (MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d)) | extend HourOfDay = datetime_part("Hour", TimeGenerated) | where HourOfDay < 9 or HourOfDay >= 17
properties.displayName: MDE portal config change outside business hours

properties.description: Defender Potentially Unwanted Application protection was disabled tenant-wide.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_PUAConfig_CL" | where FieldName == "enabled" and NewValue == "false"

properties.description: A Defender RBAC role was assigned to a user account that has no previous history of admin activity.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P2Governance(7d, 1d) | where StreamName == "MDE_UnifiedRbacRoles_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added" | where FieldName contains "principalId" or FieldName contains "principalName"
properties.displayName: MDE RBAC role to unusual account

properties.description: A new Event Hub or Storage target was configured for Defender telemetry streaming.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P1Pipeline(1h, 10m) | where StreamName == "MDE_StreamingApiConfig_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"

properties.description: An existing alert suppression rule had its scope widened — may silence legitimate alerts.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_SuppressionRules_CL" | where ChangeType == "Modified" | where FieldName in ("scope","conditions","machineGroup")

properties.description: Defender Tamper Protection was disabled. This allows malicious tools to modify Defender settings directly.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_AdvancedFeatures_CL" | where EntityId has "Tamper" | where FieldName == "Enabled" and NewValue == "false"

properties.description: A new URL, IP, file hash, or sender was added to the Defender tenant allow-list, bypassing blocks.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P0Compliance(2h, 15m) | where StreamName == "MDE_TenantAllowBlock_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"

properties.description: A new attack path was identified in Defender Exposure Management XSPM — a route from an entry point to a critical asset.
properties.query: MDE_Drift_P3Exposure(7d, 1h) | where StreamName == "MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL" | where ChangeType == "Added"
properties.displayName: MDE XSPM new attack path discovered

properties.description: An attack path terminates at a device tagged Critical. Immediate remediation candidate.
properties.query: MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | extend TargetCriticality = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).targetCriticality) | where TargetCriticality == "Critical" | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
properties.displayName: MDE XSPM path to critical asset
